name: Fungus Reaper
short_description: Mushlings are your friends ... until you turn them into delicious soup! An "eerie" turn-based tower defense roguelite!
detailed_description:
Your partner is taken by the forest. You want redemption, so you adventure deep into the forest to find the answer to who did it.
On your journey you collect mushlings, magical beings with powers that will help you on your journey.

At the end of the day, you turn those beings into soup to become an even stronger reaper.

Next time you might find your answer...

🍄 Features


  • Tons of different mushlings to collect for customizing each run to your playstyle
  • Tactical player movement, jump over mushlings to gain an upper hand over the beasts, or when in doubt, teleport!
  • The placement of your mushlings is the key to victory, as they are at their best when their powers combine.
  • Turn-based action with a twist! The clock is always ticking ... take too long and the beasts will move before you!
  • A new adventure every time, the forest will change so you need to do the same!
